summary: Deliverable is incomplete and cannot execute. Critical failures: (1) Workflow references ./Invoke-TestResultAggregator.Tests.ps1 (lines 28) that is not provided; (2) Aggregation step depends on ./fixtures directory (line 35) that doesn't exist; (3) No act-result.txt artifact or evidence of running through act as task requires. Code quality issues: action@v4 not pinned to full SHA (line 13); PowerShell script lacks Set-StrictMode and error handling in main entry point; task explicitly requires TDD, fixtures, and act validation—all absent. Workflow will fail immediately on test file reference and missing fixtures.
